content:
# Recommendations — next plan iter (post iter-039)

## Headline: terminal closeout — no in-loop work remains
The leg's entire closable scope is delivered axiom-clean and the file is sorry-free. No closable in-cone
sorry exists. The correct action remains **no prover dispatch**; hold for merge.

## Do NOT re-assign (blocked, out-of-cone)
- `QuotScheme.lean` χ skeletons (L126/165/201/228) — genuinely cohomology/Snapper-gated; needs
  scheme-cohomology machinery this H⁰ leg lacks and Mathlib does not provide. Body confirmed iter-038.
  Fill at merge from the cohomology leg. Do NOT re-probe.
- `RelativeSpec.lean` (7 sorries) — inherited parent code, out-of-cone.

## Reverse signal (when to resume prover work)
- USER opens the cohomology scope via `USER_HINTS.md`, OR
- a genuine in-cone sorry surfaces (none currently).

## Deferred to merge (do NOT edit in this leg)
- **Blueprint-doctor findings** (`logs/iter-039/blueprint-doctor.md`): 2 phantom `% archon:covers` +
  ~31 broken `\ref`/`\cref`/`\uses` across dormant inherited chapters (Cohomology_FlatBaseChange,
  Picard_GlueDescent, Picard_QuotScheme). Extraction artifacts; editing creates merge conflicts.
- **Coverage debt**: 356 `lean_aux` unmatched nodes — inherited parent-blueprinted construction decls.
  Merge-time reconciliation, not this leg's debt.

## Subagent dispatch guidance for next plan iter
- strategy-critic: skip while STRATEGY.md SHA-stable + prior SOUND.
- progress-critic: skip — only route completed iter-036, no trajectory.
- blueprint-reviewer: skip — no prover dispatch ⇒ HARD GATE moot.
- lean-auditor / lean-vs-blueprint-checker: skip — no `.lean` edits.
